final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing UI mockup for an e-commerce landing page hero section for a Japanese beauty brand.

Style/medium: clean web UI design, bright and airy aesthetic, feminine beauty brand, soft gradients, modern sans-serif typography
Composition: full-width hero section layout with three-column structure (left text content, center model, right product display), desktop viewport 1440px width, generous whitespace
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing boost serum
Scene/backdrop: soft pink and white color palette, subtle floral accents with purple flowers, clean minimal background
Lighting/mood: soft diffused lighting, bright and welcoming, professional product photography aesthetic
Color palette: soft pink as primary, white as base, purple floral accents, gold accent for stat cards
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must display all navigation links and CTA buttons clearly; stat cards must appear as floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents; feature badges must be pill-shaped with icons; trust badges must be visible at bottom of left column
Avoid: cluttered layout, dark themes, aggressive sales aesthetics, generic stock photo look, watermarks
